summary: Phase 1 & Phase 2 features testing completed. All Photographer Gallery features (Search, Filter, Sort, Bulk Select, Delete, Custom Pricing dropdown, Hover View/AI Tag, Lightbox) working. All Surfer Gallery Lightbox features (fullscreen preview, photographer/spot/date info, heart/download buttons, keyboard navigation) working. Minor backend issue: favorite toggle API returns error.

minor.issue: Returns 'Failed to update favorite' error when toggling favorite via F key in lightbox

action_items: Investigate favorite toggle API error in Surfer Gallery lightbox (F key)
critical_code_review_comments: PhotographerGalleryManager.js: All Phase 1 features implemented correctly - search, filter, sort, bulk selection, per-item dropdown
PhotographerGalleryManager.js: Phase 2 lightbox with keyboard navigation (Escape, Arrow keys) working
SurferGallery.js: Lightbox with keyboard navigation (Escape, Arrow keys, F for favorite) implemented
SurferGallery.js: Lightbox shows photographer name, spot, date, heart and download buttons as expected
seed_data_creation: Test gallery has 3 items. Surfer has 5 gallery items (2 locked, 3 accessible).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 & 2 features fully tested. Photographer Gallery: search/filter/sort/bulk mode/dropdown menu/hover overlay/lightbox all working. Surfer Gallery: lightbox with keyboard nav working. Minor issue: favorite toggle API error when using F key in Surfer Gallery lightbox.

search_bar.details: Search input filters items by title

filter_dropdown.details: All Items, Photos Only, Videos Only, Tagged, Untagged options all work

sort_dropdown.details: Newest First, Oldest First, Most Purchased options all work

bulk_mode_select.details: Select button enables checkboxes on items

bulk_select_all_deselect_all.details: Select All/Deselect All buttons work correctly

bulk_delete_selected.details: Delete Selected button appears when items selected

per_item_dropdown_menu.details: Three-dot menu shows AI Tag Surfers, Set Custom Price, Delete options

hover_overlay.details: Hover shows View and AI Tag buttons

lightbox_info.details: Lightbox shows title, date, AI Tag button

lightbox_open.details: Click image opens lightbox with full-screen preview

lightbox_spot_date.details: Shows spot name and date (Test Beach • 4/6/2026)

lightbox_keyboard_hints.details: Shows '← → Navigate • F Favorite • Esc Close'

lightbox_arrow_navigation.details: Left/Right arrow keys navigate between images

lightbox_f_favorite.details: F key triggers favorite toggle but API returns error
